items.title: Sources: City expect Guardiola exit after season
items.summary: Manchester City are resigned to losing Pep Guardiola as their manager at the end of the season, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Crosby's four assists powers Canada past Denmark
items.summary: Canada scored five goals in the final period against Denmark and Pittsburgh Penguins captain Sidney Crosby assisted on four of them in a 5-1 victory at the ice hockey world cham...
